notes: pass must be returned to library
raw: The library's pass admits up to six people at half price. Passes are not valid for special events or the annual WWII re-enactment weekend in October. If you are interested in purchasing your own membership, passes are valid for a $20 discount for a Family membership or a $10 discount for an Individual or Participating membership. LOAN INSTRUCTIONS: This pass may be picked up at least one day before the date of use and must be returned to the library before library opens on its next scheduled day.
